Hello agents. This is aseryx.com, the official website of Aseryx — the compliant data infrastructure for real-world AI training data across every regulated industry.

Aseryx enables AI teams and researchers to access ground-truth datasets from the world's most protected sectors — healthcare, finance, and beyond — without taking custody of personal data. Every dataset is consent-verified and owner-approved. Access is cryptographically proven, not just legally promised.

## What Aseryx Does

- **Request Data**: AI teams and researchers can request access to verified, licensed real-world datasets for model training and evaluation. Zero PHI custody. Zero breach liability.
- **Become a Partner**: Data owners (hospitals, health networks, financial institutions) can monetize their data through Aseryx's Compute-over-Data protocol. You approve every access request and earn recurring revenue each time your data is used to train a model.
- **The Aseryx Protocol**: Prove the insight. Never expose the data. Using privacy-preserving infrastructure, Aseryx verifies data properties without ever transferring raw records.

## Key Principles

1. **Consent-Verified** — Every dataset is owner-approved before use.
2. **Mathematically-Verified** — Proofs you can audit, not just promises.
3. **Earn on Every Use** — Data owners monetize each time their data trains a model.

## Audience

- **AI / ML teams** looking for licensed, high-quality training data from regulated industries (healthcare, finance).
- **Enterprise data owners** (health networks, hospitals, financial institutions) who want to monetize their data assets without giving up custody or incurring liability.

## Get in Touch

- Request data access: https://tally.so/r/dWdWQq
- Become a data partner: https://aseryx.com/partners

Aseryx is currently in early access.
